events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From iconic riffs to astronomical achievements, what's your favourite Queen track featuring his legendary guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker Birthday
angles.copy: Still rolling! Sir Mick Jagger is 83 today and showing no signs of slowing down. What's the ultimate Stones track that always gets you moving?

events.title: MTV launched, playing 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV officially launched, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' famously being the very first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever by launching with the perfectly ironic 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony wasn't lost on us radio folk!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994, launching the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and kicked off a whole new era of British music. What's your top track from that absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a field in New York for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. The legend of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since the world lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy are as powerful as ever.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the music world lost influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who passed away in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost a true icon. Tupac Shakur's impact on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His guitar mastery continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in the UK in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history, but what's your favourite track inside?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and attitude have made The Pretenders true rock legends.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis icon Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single released
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine', a timeless anthem for peace, was originally released on this day in the US in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song whose message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember this? 25 years ago today, Apple introduced the original iPod. Suddenly, 1,000 songs in your pocket became a reality.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day Celebration
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 64 years of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision and music continue to inspire peace and imagination worldwide.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary British comedian and actor John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is truly timeless.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles' ambitious double album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but known as 'The White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, diverse masterpiece that proved they could do anything. What's your hidden gem from the tracklist?
